criticalRules: Control port is refresh trigger, NOT clock
exprs line 0: alpha rotation angle (-1 = auto)
exprs line 1: theta view angle (-1 = auto)
exprs lines 2-4: colormap, min, max (same as CMATVIEW)
Integer parameters last 2 values control angle auto/manual
description: 3D matrix block - displays matrix data as 3D colored surface visualization
anomalies: 5-parameter exprs (vs 3 for CMATVIEW) - adds view angle parameters
exprs line 0-1: alpha/theta view angles (-1 = auto)
Integer parameters: [min, max, colors, alpha_enable, theta_enable]
More complex than CMATVIEW with 3D view capabilities
name: CMAT3D
